My work Get in touch

About me

I'm a London-based entrepreneur and three-time founder who has spent the last 18 years building B2B businesses — and making most of the mistakes worth making along the way.

My co-founders and I launched RateMyPlacement — now Higherin.com — straight out of Loughborough University in 2007. In 2013, I co-founded Akkroo, a B2B event lead capture platform, which was acquired by US-based Integrate in 2019 for $34M. Two successful exits later, my long-time co-founder Andy Higgs and I started ReelFlow in 2024 — helping B2B businesses bring their websites to life with interactive video experiences that build trust and convert more of the right visitors.

Alongside ReelFlow, I do a small amount of advisory work with UK-based B2B startups and some early-stage angel investing.

Outside of work, I'm a husband and dad to three young kids — which is a great way to stay grounded about what actually matters.

If you're building something interesting and think I could be useful, or would like to learn more about what we're building with ReelFlow, I'd love to hear from you!

Work

2022 — present
CEO & Co-founder

Interactive video platform for B2B websites. Helps complex businesses explain their product and convert more of the right visitors through short, branching video flows. Built with co-founder Andy Higgs.

2022 — present

Advisory & Angel Investing

Advisor / Angel Investor

Working with the leadership teams of a small number of UK-based B2B startups in an advisory capacity, alongside some early-stage angel investing.

2019 — 2022
General Manager, Event Solutions — EMEA

Joined Integrate following the acquisition of Akkroo, leading the Event Solutions business across EMEA — working with enterprise marketing teams on demand generation and account-based marketing.

2013 — 2019
CEO & Co-founder

Built Akkroo from zero to acquisition — a B2B event lead capture platform used by enterprise marketing teams globally. Acquired by Integrate in 2019.

Acquired by Integrate
2007 — 2013

MBO exit

Writing

I share thoughts on B2B SaaS, startup building, GTM strategy, and the journey of founding ReelFlow on LinkedIn. Topics include go-to-market, interactive video, B2B marketing, and what it's really like to build a startup for the third time.
